Quality Education.reason: Course promotes understanding of history, supporting Target 4.7 on knowledge for sustainable development.
evidence: 具備日本主要國內大事的知識

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters understanding of foreign history and '社會文化' (socio-culture), contributing to global citizenship (Target 4.7).
evidence: 具備理解外國歷史的能力

Gender Equality.reason: The study of '社會文化變遷' (socio-cultural changes) may tangentially touch upon historical gender roles, but it is not a stated focus of the course.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Analysis of historical '政治體制' (political systems) and '社會文化變遷' (socio-cultural changes) implicitly covers topics of social hierarchy and inequality, relevant to Target 10.2.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course covers historical topics like '國風文化' (Kokufu culture), which contributes to understanding the world's cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course core is the study of '政治體制' (political systems) and '對外關係' (foreign relations), directly aligning with the historical development of institutions and peace (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course examines '對外關係' (foreign relations) and '日本與周邊國家的互動' (Japan's interaction with neighboring countries), providing a historical perspective on international cooperation (Target 17.16).
evidence: 日本與周邊國家的互動
